444f44f9-6270-4e37-ab8a-0d1b19902a60.Text:
At the start of combat, the crime lord gains +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} stacks of the sure-fire plan effect. Activation of this {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} consumes 1 stack and makes the next action stronger depending on the type of action:
-<indent=5%>If the crime lord attacks, they deal +{uip|AdditionalDamage|f8fbdb667b6a4dca814aec2bb5f14097}% more {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>If the crime lord moves, they gain +{uip|AdditionalDodge|f8fbdb667b6a4dca814aec2bb5f14097}% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g} until the start of their next turn.</indent>
-<indent=5%>If the crime lord uses a non-damaging ability on an enemy, that enemy suffers a −{uip|AdditionalDamageTarget|f8fbdb667b6a4dca814aec2bb5f14097}% penalty to damage for one round.</indent>
Can be used multiple times per turn.

185ef885-5fd4-4cdb-a8d8-0f7529843e9b.Text:
The {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} of sure-fire plan is increased by +{uip|DamageBonus|d29bd0cb21184342a09e7b928eaac0dc}%. Killing at least one enemy with the attack restores 1 stack of sure-fire plan.
The Crime Lord will passively gain +{uip|CritDamageBonus|d29bd0cb21184342a09e7b928eaac0dc}% critical damage. If attacking a target with less than 50% health, they will penetrate +{uip|ArmorPenetrationBonus|d29bd0cb21184342a09e7b928eaac0dc}% armor and +{uip|DeflectionBonus|d29bd0cb21184342a09e7b928eaac0dc} deflection.

971cdb14-a027-415d-8f15-666bd6b14b68.Text:
The {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g} from sure-fire plan is increased by +{uip|AdditionalDodge|1badb7fcaefb458a947f78ead3795587}% . Dodging or parrying at least one attack by the start of the next {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g} restores 1 stack of sure-fire plan.
The Crime Lord will passively gain +{uip|PassiveDodge|1badb7fcaefb458a947f78ead3795587}% dodge and parry chance if their health is below 50%.

6a93bc3c-bc9c-4533-971a-126c87fe55b2.Text:
An enemy affected by sure-fire plan also suffers a −{uip|DodgeParryReduction|885ee31fc7ac49b9b75abd270004635d}% {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g} to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}.
The Crime Lord will passively apply {g|Encyclopedia:Perplexed}perplexed{/g} on critical hits if their target fails a Willpower check with a -10 bonus.

f83d8c0e-39ef-4b6d-ba1f-cb61fac0b4a6.Text:
At the start of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, if the crime lord has no stacks of sure-fire plan, they gain +1 stack.
The Crime Lord will use Intelligence instead of Fellowship if it is higher, and will be able to upgrade Intelligence even if their archetype does not allow it. They will also gain +{uip|StatBonus|d339c2dd02004d81b377bcb7fabcdc4a} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}.
Missed attacks will be rerolled once.
